title: Trail conditions: Škabrjelka
short: Most of the line is dry and fast; shaded sections still have some leaves and small branches.
long:
Tip: after rain, avoid sliding on the edges and brake as smoothly and in control as possible.

If you spot a fallen tree or major damage, let us know (email/IG) with the location and a photo.

title: Call for help: more hands at trail work days
short: Lately we’ve been too few on work days, while there’s always more to do.
long:
If you can contribute 1–2 hours, it makes a huge difference. We have the tools, the meet-up is always simple, and we adapt the pace to the team.

The goal is well-maintained, safe trails with minimal impact on the environment.

title: Trail Maintenance for Upcoming Races
alt: TCS Trail Maintenance for Upcoming Races
short: Over the weekends and not only, the **TCS crew** will work intensively on **preparing the trails** for the upcoming April competitions.
long: Over the weekends and not only, the **TCS crew** will work intensively on **preparing the trails** for the upcoming April competitions. Maintenance will took place on the slopes of **Škabrijel** and **Sveta Gora**. Most stages will follow existing paths with minor adjustments. The biggest highlight is the new "Power Stage" for the E-MTB European Cup, located near the main event area, on the opposite bank of the Soča River.

id: Registrations for the European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open
title: Registrations for the European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open
short: Registrations for the **European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open** | Nova Gorica | April 18th-19th 2026, part of **SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica**.
long:
**SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica**, will open the season 2026 on April 18th and 19th with a race that will also count as the **European e-MTB Enduro Tour** in the Elite and Open categories. The event, organized by the **TCS association**, will take place on the slopes of Škabrijel, Skalnica and Sabotin.

Registrations are open until April 9th, 2026.

More info: [www.sloenduro.com/european-e-mtb-enduro-tour-nova-gorica-2026/?lang=en](url)

id: Registrations for SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica are open | Nova Gorica | April 18-19, 2026
title: Registrations for SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica are open
short:
Registrations for **SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica** are open | Nova Gorica | April 18th-19th 2026.
The first race of the SloEnduro series this year!
long:
**SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica** starts on April 18th- 19th!

The event, organized by the **TCS Association**, will take place on the slopes of **Škabrijel**, **Skalnica** and **Sabotin**.

Enduro spectacle in the vicinity of Nova Gorica!

The upcoming event over the Goriška capital, will take the competitors to three different peaks, where steep and technically advanced descents await them, which are strongly reminiscent of alpine cycling. To test the endurance of the participants, one of the stages will last more than six minutes, which requires top physical fitness.

This year's event is particularly significant because of the following highlights:
**International participation:** In addition to points for the domestic SloEnduro Cup, the race will be part of the European e-MTB Enduro Tour series.
**Saturday's program:** e-riders will compete on two special "power stage" tests on the first day.
**Logistics and regeneration:** the main gathering point with refreshments, will be located on Sunday at the Kekec Restaurant, where the cyclists will regain their energy, during the individual parts of the race.

**Registrations are open until April 13th 2026.**

More info at: [www.sloenduro.com/sloenduro-tcs-nova-gorica-2026/?lang=en](url)
